title: Egghead Opening — Chapter 1061
main_description: The Straw Hats reach Egghead, meet Bonney, and discover Vegapunk’s impossible future island while Law is drawn into Blackbeard’s ambush. This chapter contains 4 structured story parts and 140 cleaned dialogue lines.
